title: Freshly Grounded Portuguese Almonds Stir-fry
description: A light and fresh meal-prep dish featuring a blend of cured almonds for an almond essence that's both savory and raw-friendly.
instructions: Wash the almonds thoroughly to remove any debris.
Slice the red bell pepper into thin strips.
Mince the garlic cloves finely, removing the skins if preferred for a cleaner look.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the almonds and stir-fry until they start to brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and red bell pepper, stir-frying for another minute or two.
Toss in the green onions and season with salt and black pepper as desired.
Cook until all ingredients are heated through and combined evenly, about 1 more minute.
